_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

validations.logic: Courier batch must be received and not unresolved count_mismatch unless admin override exists.
Unresolved courier count mismatch blocks OMR import.
Answer key must be approved or active.
Source OMR file must be private.
Required import columns must be present for selected source_type.
Every scored row must match candidate_id in same school and participation.
Duplicate candidate_id in one import blocks approval.
Imported sheet count must match courier received count or require evaluation admin review.
Scores are generated by scoring engine; manual score override forbidden in MVP.
Raw OMR payload and answer data are restricted to evaluation/admin roles.
